status: fixed compile errors reported by GitHub Actions

github_errors_fixed.fix: Added quickMoveStack(Player,int) returning ItemStack.EMPTY for the closed dummy recipe menu adapter.

github_errors_fixed.error: ProjectileUtil.getHitResultOnMoveVector not found in Forge 1.19.2 official mappings
github_errors_fixed.fix: Replaced with ProjectileUtil.getHitResult(this, this::canHitEntity), preserving the same projectile hit-result path as a 1.19.2 adapter.
Replaced with the Forge 1.19.2 official mapped field this.onGround.
Changed the method signature from LevelReader to BlockGetter and added the import.

audit_updates: Updated Stage174 projectile audit to require the Forge 1.19.2 ProjectileUtil.getHitResult adapter instead of getHitResultOnMoveVector.
Updated Stage180 ember audit to require this.onGround field access instead of onGround().
Updated github_static_audit compile-risk scan to forbid the three GitHub-failing API patterns.
parity_note: No TC4 mechanics were changed. These are Forge 1.19.2 API adapter fixes for code paths introduced by earlier parity stages.
